zh.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour是Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean和Margaret Maclean的兒子，於1416年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德古爾。他於大約1430年與Evere Cameron在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1479年在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德古爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour是Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean和Margaret Maclean的儿子，于1416年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德古爾。他于大约1430年与Evere Cameron在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1479年在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德古爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour was born in 1416, in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland as the son of Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean and Margaret Maclean. He married Evere Cameron about 1430, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died in 1479, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour est né en 1416, à Ardgour, Argyll, Écosse, fils de Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean et Margaret Maclean. Il a épousé Evere Cameron environ 1430, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé en 1479, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Ardgour, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour wurde 1416 in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, als Sohn von Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean und Margaret Maclean geboren. Er hat um 1430 in Scotland Evere Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb 1479 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour è nato il nel 1416 nel Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland come figlio di Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean e Margaret Maclean. Lui sposato Evere Cameron circa 1430, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1479, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland.

スコットランドアルグイルアルドゴウル
ja.Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイル
ja.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgourは1416年にスコットランドアルグイルアルドゴウルでLachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLeanとMargaret Macleanの息子として生まれた。約1430年にスコットランドでEvere Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1479年に故郷で63歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアルドゴウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour(은)는 1416년 스컷랜드 아그이 아지우르에서 Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean(와)과 Margaret Maclean의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1430년 스컷랜드에서 Evere Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1479년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 아지우르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour nasceu em 1416, em Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland filho de Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean e Margaret Maclean. Ele casou-se com Evere Cameron aproximadamente 1430, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1479, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour родился в 1416 г. в местности арджоур, аргилл, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean и Margaret Maclean. Он женился на женщине по имени Evere Cameron около 1430 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер в 1479 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности арджоур, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour nació en 1416, en Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland como hijo de Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean y Margaret Maclean. Se casó con Evere Cameron aproximadamente 1430, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1479, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland.
